mission.title: podman-container-tools: podman machine init - allow for overriding ignition file
mission.description: podman machine init - allow for overriding ignition file. Requested by 10+ users.

steps.title: Check current podman-container-tools setup
steps.description:
Verify your podman-container-tools version and configuration:
```bash
podman --version
```
This feature requires a working podman-container-tools installation.

steps.title: Review podman-container-tools configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant podman-container-tools configuration:
Given the newest "container on the desktop" news it would be great to have podman in a good usable state on other platforms besides Linux. Currently on my work machine we're MITM with CA certificates.

steps.title: Apply the fix for podman machine init - allow for overriding ignition file
steps.description:
Users suggested we add the ability to merge a user's ignition file with
the ignition fie created by podman init.  You can now specify one or
more override files which will be added to the default ignition file.

[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "podman machine init - allow for overriding ignition file" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
Users suggested we add the ability to merge a user's ignition file with
the ignition fie created by podman init.  You can now specify one or
more override files which will be added to the default ignition file.

[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]

prerequisites.description: A working podman-container-tools installation or development environment.
